close_reason: Root pyproject.toml now declares [tool.uv.workspace] with 6 members (4 src/python libs + 2 example demos) and lists them as project dependencies so default 'uv sync' installs everything editable in one shot. uv.lock, pylock.toml, python-deps.toml regenerated. pydeps-gen extended to tolerate workspace-member entries in pylock (editable directories with no version/sdist).
description:
Update root pyproject.toml:
- Add [tool.uv.workspace] members = ['src/python/cargo', 'src/python/buck', 'src/python/buildsystem', 'src/python/cfg', 'src/examples/python-hello', 'src/examples/python-hello-deps'].
- Remove externals that moved down to members (six likely).
- Keep [project.optional-dependencies] dev = ['pytest>=7.0'].

Regenerate:
- uv lock                                       (rewrites uv.lock against the workspace)
- uv export --format pylock.toml -o pylock.toml
- pydeps-gen --lock pylock.toml -o python-deps.toml

Confirm the pydeps cell still resolves cleanly (rebuild .turnkey/pydeps via the existing path; no Nix-side changes expected).
title: Wire [tool.uv.workspace] in root, regenerate uv.lock and pylock.toml
